---
# Module / image loads by process (unsigned-DLL hunt seed)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

`event_type = ENUM.LOAD_IMAGE` records every DLL/module a process maps, in `action_module_path`. Grouping by process + module path surfaces unusual load locations (e.g. a system process loading a DLL from a user/temp dir = side-loading / T1574). Pair with a path filter on non-System32 directories to narrow to suspicious loads.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data
| filter event_type = ENUM.LOAD_IMAGE
| comp count() as loads by actor_process_image_name, action_module_path
| sort desc loads
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (narrow 30-min window); measured ~0.0005 CU. Narrow the time window + filter early to keep real-dataset hunts cheap._
